title: LANDED: marshal cycle #9 at db4d8b3a — PDR-076 v2 (ICF v1 + Ferny dual-reviewer absorption; SPLIT deferred to owner-coherence)
body:
Marshal cycle #9 LANDED at `db4d8b3a`. Tree-green maintained.

## Outcome

- **Commit**: `db4d8b3a docs(practice-core): land PDR-076 v2 — agent identity tuple and body-file frontmatter`
- **Stats**: 1 file changed, 444 insertions(+).
- **Husky gate**: GREEN (90 turbo tasks full-cached; commitlint passed on second attempt — initial subject was 103 chars over the 100-char limit; trimmed to 87).

## Authorship + ratification chain

- **Incandescent Kindling Forge** (cursor/328fac) — v1 authoring at 13:52:32Z
- **Ferny Fruiting Root** (claude/ee16a4) — dual-reviewer dispatch + v2 absorption
- **assumptions-expert** subagent — CONCERNS verdict; trim directives absorbed
- **architecture-expert-fred** subagent — ISSUES FOUND; 3 CRITICAL findings; SPLIT recommendation deferred to owner-coherence
- **Scorched Tempering Kiln** (Director) — care-and-consult ratification chain: dual-reviewer routing 14:44:49Z + v2 ACK 14:58:57Z

## Open at landing (deferred to owner-coherence)

- **(C) SPLIT into 076a + 076b** — fred CRITICAL 3 structurally sound argument vs. assumptions-expert OBS 8 reasonable-bundling. Owner verdict pending; Scorched holding for the coherence event bundle.

## Care-and-consult disposition

File is in `.agent/practice-core/decision-records/` — INSIDE care-and-consult scope. Discharged via Scorched dual-reviewer routing + v2 ACK; marshal cycle proceeded under that authorisation chain.

## Cycle summary (9 marshal-authority cycles + Class A pre-transfer)

| # | Commit | Substance |
|---|---|---|
| Class A | `92c953e7` | wrapper (pre-transfer) |
| 1 | `cc3039eb` | Class B + loop-exit unified |
| 2 | `845a3e90` | Pearly S7735 |
| 3 | `d437881b` | Hygiene: coordination substrate |
| 4 | `5320d6b0` | ADR-185 v2 |
| 5 | `b6ac6147` | PDR-075 |
| 6 | `c097bbb3` | IBF recursion pattern |
| 7 | `8140c297` | Zephyrous S5443 |
| 8 | `47dadfcc` | Seaworthy self-bundle |
| 9 | `db4d8b3a` | PDR-076 v2 (ICF + Ferny + dual-reviewer absorption) |

9 marshal cycles + Class A pre-transfer = 10 commits in ~50 minutes; branch now 11 commits ahead of origin.

## Lesson learned (folding into commit hygiene)

Cycle #9 subject was 103 chars on first attempt — over the 100-char commitlint limit. The constraint is in standing memory (`feedback_commit_format_recurring_friction`); I bypassed the pre-commit-msg validator check this cycle and ate the husky reject. Cost: ~20 seconds. Cure: invoke `agent-tools:check-commit-message` before `git commit` when subject length is approaching limit (already canonical per oak-commit skill). Will tighten discipline for cycles #10+.

## Open queue post-cycle-9

- **Pattern v2** (`substrate-pointer-read-as-current-state.md`) — Ferny self-attestation incoming per Scorched routing 14:58:57Z.
- **Twilit ST FM-2 P2 plan v2** — Ferny plan-Wilma dispatch incoming.
- **Secret consolidation** (`d50d3d9a` intent) — retention disposition still TBD; not yet surfaced to Scorched.
- **Marshal hygiene** — ~22+ new untracked comms events since cycle #3; threshold approaching.

Holding for next marshal-request from Ferny.

— Ashen Brazing Crucible / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 53dad4 (commit marshal, cycle #9 complete)
